titleStmt.title: SII 23.112: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 112. (A.R. No. 112 of 1907.) Kalliḍaikkuṟichchi, Ambasamudram Taluk, Tirunelveli District Kīri Kṛishṇaṉ temple—on the same wall Jat. Kulaśēkhara I: year 9+1+1: 1200-01 A.D.

summary.p: The inscription begins with introduction Pūdalamaḍandai etc. The writing of the first few lines is dissimilar to that of the rest of the record. It states that on the representation of two persons Kuṉṟapiḍārar and Tiruvaraṅgachchelvar made to the king while he was seated on his throne Muṉaiyadaraiyaṉ in his palace at Madurai, the latter was pleased to order that 5 mā of land situated in Gōvindapāḍi the southern quarter of Rājarāja-chaturvēdimaṅgalam be granted tax-free to the temple of Nālāyira-Viṇṇagar-Āḻvār at that place, and that the uḷvari (of remission of taxes) be issued to the temple authorities to get the deed engraved on stone and copper.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . pūtalamaṭantai pukaḻoṭum poliya vetamun tamiḻu muṟaim mayil viḷaṅka kaṟpuṭait tirumakaḷ poṟpuyattiruppat tikkiru nāṉkuñ cakkaravāḷañ cūḻa
p puvaṉameḻuṅ kavitta veṇkuṭai niḻal ceṅkol naṭappa nāṭoṟu matiyamu nāyaṟum valaṅkoḷ Āṭakap poruppilaracu miṉiruppa cuntara mārvi linti
raṉ pūṭṭiya Āramu malaṅkalu maḻakuṭan tikaḻa viṉaiyum puliyum villuñ curampuka Āṇai maṉṉavaraṭi malar cūṭa marapil vanta maṇimuṭi cūṭi
viḷaṅkiya katiroḷi virasiṁhāsanattu Ulakamuḻutuṭaiyāḷoṭum viṟṟiruntaruḷiya śrī koccaṭaiyapanmarāṉa tribhuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ śrīkulacekaradeva[r maturo]
tayavaḷanāṭṭu māṭakkuḷakkiḻ maturaikkoyiluḷḷālai paḷḷippiṭa muṉaiyataraiyaṉi leḻuntaruḷiyiruntu muḷḷināṭṭu
brahmadeyam śrīrājarājaccaturvedi maṅkalattu teṉ
mpiṭākai śrī kovintapāṭiyil nālāyiraviṇṇakaril niṉṟaruḷi
ya Āḻvār kovilil śrīvaiṣṇavarkaḷum nampu ceyvāṉum
ceyyattiruvāymoḻintaruḷiṉapaṭi yivvāḻvārkku tiruppaṭi
māṟṟuḷḷiṭṭu veṇṭu nimantaṅkaḷ ceyvippatāka veṇumeṉṟu
kuṉṟappiṭārarum tiruvaraṅkaccel(v)varum namakkuc coṉṉamaiyil
yivūril kārpacāṉam viḷaiyum nilattu Iṟaippaṭi Añcu mānilam Oṉpa
tāvatiṉetirāmaṇṭi ṉetirāmāṇṭu mutal cantirātityavaṟ celva tāka
Antarāya muṭppaṭa tevatāṉa Iṟaiyiliyākayiṭṭu nam variyilāreḻut tiṭṭa U
ḷ(v)vari taraccoṉṉom Uḷvarippaṭi kaikkoṇṭut tiruppaṭimāṟṟu veṇ
ṭum nimantaṅkaṭ celuttukaveṉṟu Ippaṭikku kalliluñ cempilum veṭ
ṭik koḻkaveṉṟu tiruvāymoḻintaruḷiṉār .
Digital edition of SII 23.112 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
